description: T1/T2 기본 파이프라인 완성 후 다음 레벨 로드맵 — 15+N 확장 가능
prerequisite: T1 463 tok/s PASS + T2 7.02h/1B PASS (2026-04-11 ossified)

items.name: PagedAttention
items.summary: Block table + page allocator (free list) + copy-on-write fork + paged attention forward (online softmax). 20 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Speculative Decoding
items.description: 작은 모델로 드래프트 -> 큰 모델 검증

items.name: SSM/Mamba
items.summary: S4 block (A,B,C,D state space) + ZOH discretization + selective scan (input-dependent delta gating) + conv1d causal + Mamba block (conv->SSM->gate) + MambaBlock struct. 14 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Vision Transformer
items.summary: Patch embedding + positional embedding + ViT encoder (multi-head self-attention + FFN + LayerNorm + residual) + CLS token classification + cosine similarity + CLIP contrastive loss (bidirectional) + contrastive matrix. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: 모델 머징
items.summary: TIES (magnitude trim + sign elect + weighted merge) + DARE (random drop + rescale + merge) + SLERP (spherical linear interpolation via acos/sin) + vector_norm/dot. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Function Calling
items.summary: Tool schema define/format + <tool_call> parser + tool result injector + generate-parse-execute-inject loop. 38 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Knowledge Distillation
items.summary: Temperature-scaled softmax + KL divergence + cross entropy + combined distill_loss (alpha*T^2*KL + (1-alpha)*CE) + teacher/student forward + batch gradient train step. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Pruning
items.summary: Magnitude pruning (abs threshold) + structured pruning (L1 norm row removal) + compute_sparsity + cubic sparsity schedule + fine-tune step (sparsity-preserving SGD) + iterative pruning. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Hyperparameter Search
items.summary: Grid search (all combos) + random search (bounded sampling) + Bayesian optimization (RBF kernel GP + EI acquisition) + trial runner with early stopping. 12 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: 안전장치
items.description: 프롬프트 인젝션 감지, 콘텐츠 필터, 속도 제한, 입력 정제, 출력 검증

items.name: Semantic Cache
items.summary: Cosine similarity cache + configurable threshold + LRU eviction (tick-based) + hit/miss stats + cache_clear/remove. 14 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: 벤치마크 스위트
items.summary: MMLU few-shot evaluator + HumanEval pass@k(1,5,10) + MT-Bench multi-turn word-overlap scorer + unified ASCII/JSONL report. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: GQA/MQA Attention
items.summary: GQA head grouping + MQA single-KV + repeat_kv/repeat_kv_2d + causal GQA + MHA baseline. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: RoPE Scaling / ALiBi
items.description: 긴 문맥 위치 인코딩 (NTK-aware, YaRN, ALiBi)
items.summary: Standard RoPE + NTK-aware scaling + YaRN (NTK+freq decomposition) + ALiBi slopes/bias/causal + apply_rope_to_vec + alibi_attention. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Sliding Window Attention
items.summary: Sliding window causal attention + multi-head variant + window mask + noncausal mask + rolling KV-cache (ring buffer) + cache attention. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Continuous Batching
items.summary: Request queue + iteration-level scheduling + dynamic slot fill/evict + per-request KV state + run_until_done + scheduler_stats. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Tensor Parallelism
items.remaining: column/row parallel linear + all-reduce + 통신 최적화

items.name: Mixed Precision Training
items.summary: FP16 sim forward/backward + FP32 master weights + dynamic loss scaling (backoff/growth) + overflow detection. 20 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Activation Checkpointing
items.description: 학습 시 중간 활성화 재계산 (메모리 절약)
items.summary: Checkpoint boundary + selective recompute + memory_saved_ratio + compute_overhead_ratio. 18 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Quantization-Aware Training
items.summary: Fake quantize (INT8/INT4) + STE backward + STE masked + per-channel calibrate_scale + qat_forward/backward. 17 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
items.summary: Agent registry + keyword task router + top-N routing + direct/broadcast messaging + pub/sub topics + majority/weighted consensus + run_task. 32 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Speech/Audio (Whisper식)
items.summary: Mel spectrogram (DFT + mel filterbank + log power) + audio encoder (conv1d + transformer blocks) + CTC greedy/beam decode + Griffin-Lim vocoder + end-to-end pipeline. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Continual Learning
items.description: 이전 지식 유지하며 새 데이터 학습
items.summary: EWC (Fisher information + penalty) + SI (online omega accumulation) + replay buffer (circular + sampling) + task boundary detection (spike + windowed) + continual_train_step. 24 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Neural Architecture Search
items.summary: Search space definition + random/evolutionary architecture sampling + mutation/crossover + FLOPs/accuracy evaluator + Pareto front (non-dominated sort) + run_evolution + run_random_search. 31 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Gradient Accumulation
items.description: 작은 배치 여러 번 누적 → 큰 effective batch
items.summary: Accumulator create/accumulate/should_step/get_accumulated/reset + effective_batch_size + sync timing. 27 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Tokenizer Training
items.summary: BPE training from scratch: count_pairs + merge_pair + train_bpe (iterative most-frequent merge) + encode/decode roundtrip + [PAD]/[UNK]/[BOS]/[EOS] special tokens + save/load vocab. 21 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Federated Learning
items.description: 분산 노드에서 모델 공동 학습 (데이터 비공유)
items.summary: Client selection (fraction sampling) + local SGD train + FedAvg weighted aggregation + gradient clipping + Gaussian DP noise + privacy budget (epsilon) + run_federation_round/run_federation. 27 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: KV-Cache Compression
items.summary: INT8 symmetric quantization + dequantization + attention-based token importance scoring (softmax) + multi-head importance + eviction policy (argmin least important) + compressed cache forward + compression ratio. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Dynamic Early Exit
items.description: 쉬운 토큰 → 얕은 레이어에서 조기 종료
items.summary: Sigmoid/softmax/entropy confidence estimators + threshold-based early exit + layer skip + full forward baseline + batch exit distribution + avg layers used + speedup calc. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Adapter Fusion
items.summary: Adapter registry (name->weights CRUD) + attention-based fusion (query*key softmax) + hard/soft task routing + weighted merge + single/fused forward. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Prefix Caching
items.summary: FNV-1a hash + prefix store/lookup + longest prefix match + LRU eviction + invalidation + clear + stats (hit/miss rate). LookupResult struct for immutable pattern. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Prompt Compression
items.summary: Perplexity-based token importance + entropy importance (windowed) + ratio/topk compression + config-based protection zones (first/last N) + argsort + quality estimation + iterative compress. 15 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Curriculum Learning
items.remaining: difficulty scorer + pacing function + data scheduler

items.name: Multi-Task Learning
items.description: 단일 모델로 여러 태스크 동시 학습
items.remaining: task head routing + loss balancing + shared encoder

items.name: RLAIF
items.remaining: AI judge prompt + preference pair 생성 + DPO/PPO 연결

items.name: Output Watermark
items.remaining: green/red token list + logit bias + detection z-test

items.name: CoT Distillation
items.remaining: CoT trace 수집 + trace-conditioned loss + step-by-step KD

items.name: Embedding Fine-tune
items.remaining: contrastive loss + hard negative mining + triplet training

items.name: Model Sharding
items.remaining: layer-wise offload + async prefetch + disk mmap

items.name: Reward Model
items.remaining: preference pair loader + Bradley-Terry loss + reward head

items.name: Data Deduplication
items.remaining: MinHash signature + LSH banding + near-duplicate cluster + dedup filter

items.name: Mixture of Depths
items.remaining: token router + capacity factor + auxiliary loss

items.name: Ring Attention
items.description: 시퀀스 분할 + 디바이스 간 KV 순환
items.summary: Sequence chunking + ring KV rotation + causal blockwise attention + online softmax merge + ra_ring_attention full pipeline. 22 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Sparse Upcycling
items.summary: Expert replication + noise symmetry breaking + uniform router init + top-k routing + softmax weights + load balance loss + cosine LR schedule + upcycle + finetune step. 17 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: DPO Variants
items.summary: IPO (bounded log-ratio squared loss) + KTO (single-sided sigmoid preference) + ORPO (odds-ratio penalty, no ref model) + combined dispatcher + DPO baseline + gradient + reward margin + accuracy. 19 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Synthetic Data Gen
items.summary: Template create/fill + seed-based variant generation + length/diversity/coherence scoring + quality filter + hash-based dedup + near-dedup Jaccard + full pipeline + quality stats. 20 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Context Distillation
items.summary: Teacher long-context forward + L2-norm importance scoring + position ranking + key extraction + context compression + student short forward + KD loss (alpha*T^2*KL + (1-alpha)*CE) + mean pool. 18 tests ALL PASS.
